data.title: HUB Cyber Security (Nasdaq: HUBC) strengthens ties with European financial firm through new cybersecurity services.
data.description: In Tel Aviv, Israel on December 11, 2025, HUB Cyber Security Ltd. (Nasdaq: HUBC), a renowned player in confidential computing and secured data fabric technologies, revealed an extension of its partnership with a significant European financial institution. The expanded agreement encompasses additional cybersecurity assessment and consultancy services, enhancing their existing multi-year commitment.

data.title: GitHub Actions boosted with performance and flexibility upgrades! New features like YAML anchors and expanded caching introduced.
data.description: GitHub recently revealed major enhancements to its Actions platform to provide developers with improved performance and flexibility. The upgrades incorporate new elements such as YAML anchors and expanded caching capabilities. These modifications aim to streamline development processes and offer more efficient solutions to users.

data.title: American Crane donates 27,000+ meals during their annual GRIT Day celebration in partnership with Helping Harvest, showing community commitment.
data.description: In Douglassville, Pennsylvania, on December 11, 2025, the American Crane & Equipment Corporation revealed that they were able to efficiently prepare and give away more than 27,000 meals at their yearly Employee Appreciation Day event, nicknamed GRIT Day. Collaborating with Helping Harvest, the meals will be distributed to those in need.

data.title: Bank of Mexico highlights risks for stablecoins due to inconsistent global rules, with liquidity, contagion, and regulatory-arbitrage risks rising as crypto use grows in Latin America.
data.description: The latest stability report from the Bank of Mexico highlights potential risks as cryptocurrency adoption surges in Latin America. The report specifically points out concerns related to liquidity, contagion, and regulatory-arbitrage. As the adoption of cryptocurrencies accelerates in the region, these risks become more pronounced. The report serves as a warning about the challenges and vulnerabilities that may arise, especially as digital assets play an increasingly significant role in the financial landscape of Latin America.
Danone announces the total shares and voting rights figures.

data.title: Binance strengthens connection with President Trump-supported $1 stablecoin following founder's pardon.
data.description: Binance has announced the integration of World Liberty Financial's stablecoin, USD1, into its core infrastructure. The cryptocurrency project, supported by President Trump, revealed the partnership which will facilitate the use of the stablecoin on the Binance platform. This move signifies a significant development in the crypto space, with USD1 now gaining access to Binance's large user base for trading and transactions.

data.title: Bitcoin and Ethereum prices plunge post-Fed meeting as charts indicate further decline ahead. Bears dominate the market.
data.description: Despite initial optimism following the Federal Reserve's announcement, Bitcoin and Ethereum have resumed their downward trends, indicating bearish control according to market charts.

data.title: Wobble Genomics to present new data at SABCS confirming platform's accurate HER2 status profiling in tissue and blood.
data.description: In Edinburgh, Scotland, on December 11, 2025, Wobble Genomics, a biotech company specializing in enhancing cancer treatment through improved diagnosis and therapy selection, will share fresh findings at the 2025 San Antonio Breast Cancer Symposium occurring from December 9-12.

data.title: OHA closes $17.7B for senior private lending strategy, including $8.0B in equity commitments.
data.description: On December 11, 2025, Oak Hill Advisors revealed the completion of fundraising for OHA Senior Private Lending Fund ("OLEND"), marking the initiation of OHA's exclusive senior private lending plan. OLEND and its associated funds have amassed a total of $17.7 billion in accessible capital through their leveraged and unleveraged options. This impressive amount includes $8.0 billion in equity commitments, positioning OLEND for strategic investment opportunities in the global credit-focused alternative asset realm.

data.title: Gilbarco Veeder-Root introduces Konect 400 kW All-in-One EV Charger for retail, combining performance, payment system.
data.description: Headquartered in Raleigh, North Carolina, Gilbarco Veeder-Root, a subsidiary of Vontier (NYSE: VNT), unveiled the Konect 400 kW All‑in‑One EV Charger. This innovative platform, tailored for the fuel and convenience retail sector, represents the initial ultra‑fast solution of its kind. The Konect system merges rapid charging capabilities with a unified payment and operational framework, ensuring a smooth customer journey spanning conventional fueling and electric charging services. This integration simplifies a traditionally complex aspect of EV charging involving various applications, payment setups, and suppliers.

data.title: PharmaCorp to acquire Pharmacy Files in Western Canada for $350,000, no finder's fee; closing in Q1 2026.
data.description: In Saskatoon, Saskatchewan on December 11, 2025, PharmaCorp RX Inc. (TSXV: PCRX) has announced a non-binding letter of intent to acquire prescription files, patient records, and operational data (referred to as Pharmacy Files) from a pharmacy in Western Canada. The purchase is set at $350,000, subject to regular adjustments, and will be funded by cash reserves. The acquisition, anticipated to be finalized in the first quarter of 2026, involves a pharmacy in the same community as one of PharmaCorp's existing PharmaChoice-bannered pharmacies. No finder's fees will be incurred for this transaction.

data.title: AMPLIFY is a finalist in three categories at the 2026 Golden Gavel Awards, known for redefining legal marketing.
data.description: In Miami on December 11, 2025, AMPLIFY, a boutique agency specializing in legal marketing and public relations, has revealed their selection as a finalist for the prestigious 2026 Golden Gavel Awards. This marks the third consecutive time that they have made it to the finalists' list for this esteemed industry recognition, showcasing their excellence in reshaping how law firms communicate their narratives.

data.title: SOLV Energy appoints Adam Forman as Chief Legal Officer & Secretary to support growth. He has 25+ years of legal experience.
data.description: In San Diego on December 11, 2025, SOLV Energy appointed Adam Forman as Chief Legal Officer and Secretary to enhance operational excellence and strategic growth. With more than 25 years of legal experience, Forman's appointment underscores the Company's dedication to progress.

data.title: Dow rises, Nasdaq & S&P 500 fall. Oracle stock plunges on earnings. Equal-Weighted S&P 500 hits high.
data.description: Today in the stock market, the Dow Jones index experienced a rise, whereas the Nasdaq and S&P 500 saw a decline. AI stock Oracle plummeted following a drop in earnings. Moreover, the Equal-Weighted S&P 500 reached a new high as ATI and Penumbra broke out. The latest live coverage revealed these movements in the market, highlighting the fluctuating trends among key indices and specific company stocks. This information is critical for investors to stay informed about the current market landscape and make strategic decisions.

data.title: Faye & Spiky.ai integrate to update SugarCRM with AI insights from Zoom, Teams, and more. Dec. 11, 2025 launch.
data.description: In a recent development, Spiky.ai's real-time meeting intelligence will now be seamlessly integrated with SugarCRM, bringing valuable AI-derived insights from popular platforms such as Zoom, Microsoft Teams, and Google Meet. This integration, announced from CALABASAS, Calif. on Dec. 11, 2025, will automatically update both standard and custom fields within SugarCRM. This innovation aims to enhance workflow efficiency and productivity for users, providing them with valuable data from meetings to optimize their customer relationship management.

data.title: Talk With Me Baby expands impact with new leadership, partnerships, and training for early language development nationwide.
data.description: On December 11, 2025, in Atlanta, it was announced that providing rich language exposure is crucial for success in education and overall well-being. This is supported by scientific evidence emphasizing the importance of early healthy brain development in the Talk With Me Baby (TWMB) program. TWMB is a pioneering initiative led by the Rollins Center for Language &...

data.title: Corporate adoption of Bitcoin slowing down in 2025, with 117 new firms adding BTC to balance sheets, but Q4 saw only 9 so far. Total: 147 firms hold under 500 BTC.
data.description: The adoption of Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) by corporations is growing in size, but the rate of growth has been slowing down towards the end of 2025. Recent data from CryptoQuant reveals that although more companies have been adding BTC to their balance sheets this year, the monthly rate of adoption has decreased. A total of 117 new firms have adopted Bitcoin in 2025, with the peak activity observed in July. The quarterly breakdown demonstrates the slowdown: Q1 had 16 companies, while Q2 and Q3 had 39 and 53 companies, respectively. However, Q4 has seen a decline with only 9 companies so far. It is worth noting that many of these corporate treasuries hold relatively small amounts of Bitcoin, with 147 companies owning under 500 BTC. For more details, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Veteran Ventures Capital invests in Vatn Systems ($60M Series A funding) to support US military autonomous underwater vehicles.
data.description: Veteran Ventures Capital (VVC) from McLean, Virginia, has revealed its involvement in the latest funding round for Vatn Systems (Vatn), a defense technology firm specializing in constructing autonomous underwater vehicles (AUVs) for the US military, as well as allied nations. The Series A financing totals $60 million.
